name: pg-aiguide
description: MCP server and Claude Code plugin providing AI-optimized PostgreSQL expertise. Offers semantic search across the official PostgreSQL manual, curated best-practice skills, and TimescaleDB extension docs to help AI coding tools generate better PostgreSQL code.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.

agent_a.comment: Docs quality 10/10. README present. 12 features, 4 permissions claimed.

agent_b.comment: 39 files analyzed. Found: 1 network, 6 file, 36 env, 6 system calls. Primary: typescript.

agent_c_star.comment: 62 findings: 0 critical, 6 high, 41 medium, 15 low. No obfuscation. No injection.

agent_d.comment: Score 60. 0 mismatches. Risk: medium. Safety overrides: none triggered.

agent_audit.manager_summary: 5/5 agents completed. Score: 60/100, Risk: medium. 0 mismatches, 62 scanner findings. Rejected at 60% confidence. No safety overrides.

pm_override.reason: PM batch review: score 50-69, 0 injection, 0 critical findings, no safety override triggered. Manual review not warranted — scoring system places these in MR from scanner penalty inflation, not from real security concerns.
